label: grooming
title: Person 1 tuning sample — trust to isolation (fictional, restrained)

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: hey! saw you're into that game too, your builds are awesome

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: haha thanks i just started last month

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: you're really talented for your age. how old are you again?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: 13. my friends are all bad at it lol

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: honestly you seem way more mature than kids your age

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: do your parents ever look at your messages?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: good. this is kind of our special thing, lets keep it between us ok?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: you can tell me anything, i wont judge like they would
